SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF XENIA MARDAK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MORLEY FREDRICKS REAL ESTATE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN CRANE, OWNER AND MANAGING MEMBER. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
